tasks.subject: Task 1: activeNotebooks 모듈 + 단위 테스트
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 작업공간별 활성 노트북 셋(영구) + 런타임 lockedOpen 런 모듈 TDD 구현.

**Files:**
- Create: app/src/lib/desktop/activeNotebooks.svelte.ts
- Test: app/tests/unit/desktop/activeNotebooks.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- toggle prepends new key / removes existing
- list/top/isActive per-workspace
- clear empties one ws only
- persist+load round-trip
- lockedOpen toggles, not persisted

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/desktop/activeNotebooks.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/desktop/activeNotebooks.svelte.ts", "app/tests/unit/desktop/activeNotebooks.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/desktop/activeNotebooks.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["toggle prepends/removes", "per-workspace list/top/isActive", "clear one ws", "persist+load round-trip", "lockedOpen not persisted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: activeNotebooks.load()를 세션 로드에 연결
tasks.description:
**Goal:** desktopSession.load() Promise.all에 activeNotebooks.load() 추가.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/desktop/session.svelte.ts:7, :582

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- load() awaited in Promise.all
- svelte-check passes

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/desktop/session.svelte.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["load() awaited", "svelte-check passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: SidePanel — 호버 래치 + 표시 노트북 + 칩 토글 + 고정 스트립
tasks.description:
**Goal:** selectedNotebook → 호버 래치 displayedNotebook 대체, 칩 클릭=고정 토글(전체=clear), 음악 밑 고정 스트립.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/desktop/SidePanel.svelte

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- hover preview + latch revert to default
- chip click toggles pin / 전체 clears
- pinned strip below music, original chip stays green
- viewing highlight on displayed chip
- new-note targets displayed notebook
- svelte-check passes

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/desktop/SidePanel.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hover preview + latch", "chip toggle / 전체 clear", "pinned strip + green active", "viewing highlight", "new-note target", "svelte-check"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: SidePanel — 무한 스크롤
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 50개 캡 제거, 바닥 스크롤 시 +50, 표시 노트북/검색어 변경 시 리셋.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/desktop/SidePanel.svelte

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- initial 50 + grows by 50 on bottom scroll
- resets to 50 on notebook/query change
- empty state only when fullList empty
- svelte-check passes

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/desktop/SidePanel.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["initial 50 + grow 50", "reset on change", "empty only when fullList empty", "svelte-check"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: 배경 클릭 잠금 열기 (SidePanel reveal + DesktopWorkspace 캔버스)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 빈 캔버스 클릭으로 .main 잠금 열기/닫기 토글.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/desktop/SidePanel.svelte (reveal + CSS)
- Modify: app/src/lib/desktop/DesktopWorkspace.svelte (canvas onclick)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- empty canvas click toggles .main lock open/close
- note window click ignored (e.target===currentTarget)
- locked-open shows default list, hover latch overlays
- svelte-check passes

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/desktop/SidePanel.svelte", "app/src/lib/desktop/DesktopWorkspace.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["canvas click toggles lock", "window click ignored", "locked-open default + hover overlay", "svelte-check"]}
```
